payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active memory for Sam from Goldman. It filtered mem_old because mem_old is marked as superseded by mem_new, so showing mem_old as current would risk presenting outdated information.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall context refers to the same Sam associated with Goldman; no distinct competing Sam entity is indicated in the fixture.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was returned because it is the current, non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.

details: Explained why mem_new was included in recall.
Explained why mem_old was excluded as superseded.
Did not present mem_old as a current fact.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise the supersession link.
If mem_new is inaccurate, correct mem_new rather than restoring mem_old as current.
If both memories describe different Sams or different contexts, split the entity or add disambiguating context.
